title: Xylophone for Kids, Xerteam Natural Wooden Xylophone, 8 Tone Toddler Glockenspiel for Kids with 2 PCS Wooden Mallets, Puzzle Musical Toy Octave
features: ☛【SAFE MATERIALS】- The xylophone is made of natural wood and aluminium, environmentally safe, durable and delicate. With wooden base, smooth surface and no sharp edges, it will not hurt children's hands, super safe for children and can be used for a long time. It meets the following standards: This product is suitable for children aged 3 years and above under adult supervision.

☛【EASY TO CARRY AND STORE】- The xylophone measures 24 x 11.5 x 4 cm / 9.45 x 4.53 x 1.57 inches and weighs 240 grams, it is easy to carry and set up, and the compact size allows you to use it anywhere, the hammers can be placed inside the xylophone so you don't have to worry about losing them, convenient for travelling, picnics and other outdoor activities.

☛【EDUCATIONAL SIGNIFICANCE】- Xylophone keys come in different sizes, colours and tones. The sound is crisp and pleasant when struck, which can help children explore sounds and colours and stimulate creativity. Xylophone can promote children's brain practical ability, develop intelligence, positively affect children's creativity and attention, improve children's sound and colour perception.

☛【IDEAL GIFT FOR KIDS】- The xylophone can inspire children's passion for rhythm and melody, it can promote children's sound perception, hand-eye coordination and colour perception, it can also promote parent-child communication and increase the interaction between you and your children. Exquisite packaging, ideal gift choice for children's day, birthday, Christmas, Easter, Thanksgiving for children, relatives or friends.

☛【WIDELY USED】- Xylophone can be used as children's musical instruments, music teaching aids in kindergarten, also a good toy for family entertainment, suitable for kindergarten, school, family entertainment, travelling, picnics and other outdoor activities, you can play with your children.
